_comment: User 2026-05-21: after Tommy's Day-1 intro dialog ends, Tommy walks off-left and exits the scene. Plays his walk_left one-shot during the npc_move tween, then hides him so re-entering camp_grounds doesn't re-spawn him on his original spot. Falls back to just hiding him if npc_tommy_walk_left.png isn't on disk yet - the swap silently no-ops on missing frames.
